request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on overseas tech to spy on us? Our national security experts warn that without strategic autonomy, we're leaving the door open to cyberattacks and industrial espionage. It's time to prioritize domestic innovation and protect our freedoms. #SecureOurFuture #TechIndependence
